footer.description: Gourmet distribution for the HORECA sector in Catalonia since 1983.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Over 40 years distributing the finest gourmet products to the Catalan hospitality sector.
about.history_p1: Alvarez Catalunya was founded in 1983 in Tarragona with a clear mission: to bring the finest Iberian and European artisan products to Catalan hospitality professionals.
about.history_p2: Over four decades we have built trusting relationships with exceptional producers who share our philosophy: quality is not a luxury, it is a requirement.
about.history_p3: Today we distribute across the provinces of Tarragona and Barcelona, serving over 500 restaurants, hotels and gourmet establishments.
about.selec_p1: Alvarez Catalunya is one of the 5 founding partners of Selec Mardis, a cooperative of specialised distributors who purchase jointly to guarantee the best quality and price conditions.
about.selec_p2: This cooperative structure allows us to access exclusive batches, direct imports and seasonal products that would individually be inaccessible to a regional distributor.
about.selec_p3: The Selec Mardis network covers the entire Iberian Peninsula, with specialised distributors in each region who know the local market and its demands perfectly.
about.value1_text: We select every product with rigorous criteria. We only work with producers who share our commitment to excellence.
about.value2_text: 40 years of lasting relationships with customers and suppliers. Trust is earned day by day, order by order.
about.value3_text: We understand the needs of the HORECA sector. Flexibility, punctuality and personalised advice are our standard.

brandsPage.title: Our Brands
brandsPage.subtitle: A carefully curated selection of the finest Iberian and European producers for high-end hospitality. Exclusively distributed in Tarragona and Barcelona as partners of the Selec Mardis cooperative.
brandsPage.networkText: Alvarez Catalunya is one of the 5 founding partners of the Selec Mardis cooperative, a network of specialised distributors covering the entire Iberian Peninsula. This cooperative structure allows us to access exclusive batches, direct imports and seasonal products that guarantee the highest quality for our customers.
brandsPage.networkMapAlt: Selec Mardis distribution network in Spain

lisardoCastro.story: From Guijuelo, the world capital of Iberian ham, Lisardo Castro produces acorn-fed and grain-fed hams with over 70 years of family tradition. Their Iberian pigs roam freely in the Salamanca dehesas, feeding on acorns during the montanera season. The result is a ham of deep, unmistakable flavour.

ibericosTorreon.story: Ibéricos Torreón produces the finest Iberian hams and cured meats in the Extremadura dehesas. With decades of tradition and a deep respect for artisan processes, their hams are synonymous with Iberian authenticity and excellence in every slice.

martiko.story: Martiko is the Spanish benchmark for premium duck products. Raising Moulard ducks in Navarre using traditional French methods, they produce an exceptional quality foie gras and magret. Their duck gyozas and beef carpaccio have become icons of Spanish avant-garde cuisine.

martikoAhumados.story: Martiko's smoked division applies the same exacting standards and passion of the parent company to a premier selection of smoked fish. Using cold-smoking techniques with selected noble woods, they achieve products of mild, unmistakable flavour, ideal for fine dining.

agromar.story: Founded in 1948 in the picturesque port of Lastres, Agromar has been producing Cantabrian seafood conserves using artisan methods for over 75 years. Their tuna belly, anchovies and gildas are a reference in Spanish fine dining. Each tin is a tribute to the Cantabrian Sea and its people.

anxovesEscala.story: The anchovies of L'Escala are unique in the world. Made following the traditional recipe with sea salt and cured for months, these Costa Brava anchovies have their own internationally recognised designation. An essential product at any gourmet Catalan table.

camporel.story: Conservas Camporel produces a wide range of high-quality vegetable and legume conserves for professional catering. Their products are characterised by the use of selected raw materials and preservation processes that retain the original flavour and nutritional properties.

sayomar.story: Sayomar is a benchmark in the selection and distribution of superior quality cod. They work exclusively with Gadus Morhua cod from the North Atlantic, cured and desalted following traditional Basque methods. Their products are indispensable in Spanish high-end restaurant kitchens.

aquanaria.story: Aquanaria is a pioneer in open-sea aquaculture in the Canary Islands. They raise sea bass in Atlantic waters over 3 km from the coast, in open cages where the fish swim freely with the ocean currents. The result is a fish of exceptional flavour, with the texture and freshness of wild fish.

ameztoi.story: The Ameztoi family has been producing artisan cheeses in Zarautz since 1974. Their smoked Idiazabal made from Latxa sheep's milk is a jewel of Basque gastronomy, protected by Designation of Origin. The balance between the smokiness and the creaminess of the milk makes this cheese a one-of-a-kind product.

arotz.story: With over 60 years of experience, Arotz is the reference specialist in wild mushrooms and truffles for fine gastronomy. They work directly with foragers in the finest forests of Spain and France, guaranteeing seasonal products and maximum freshness.

triticum.story: Triticum was founded in 2006 with the vocation of bringing slow-fermented bread to fine dining. Their breads are made with sourdough starters, organic flours and extended resting times. The finest restaurants in Spain trust their brioche, potato rolls and ciabattas to elevate their culinary offerings.

juanitoBaker.story: Juanito Baker has conquered the kitchens of Barcelona's finest restaurants with sourdough breads made from stone-milled flours and long fermentations. A benchmark in premium baking that values artisan craftsmanship and local ingredients.

laFinca.story: La Finca Jiménez Barbero is the benchmark for premium beef in Spain. Raising heifers on their own farms with a controlled diet, they produce beef with exceptional marbling, tender and delicately flavoured. Their premium cuts are essential in Spain's finest restaurants.

ramonCanals.story: From the century-old cellars of Penedès, Ramón Canals produces premium cavas and wines from grapes grown in their own vineyards. Following the traditional champenoise method and with over a century of experience, their cavas elegantly express the unique terroir of the Catalan Penedès.

casaRojo.story: Casa Rojo is a modern Spanish winery producing wines from various denominations of origin with a fresh and distinctive style. Their colourful labels and focus on quality have made them a phenomenon in the Spanish hospitality sector and in export markets around the world.

emperatriz.story: Finca La Emperatriz is a unique wine estate in La Rioja where all grape varieties coexist in a single space. With over 130 years of history, their wines express the complexity of the Riojan terroir with their own identity and a stylistic coherence that makes them unmistakable.

vinaIjalba.story: Viña Ijalba is a pioneer in organic viticulture in La Rioja. They work with almost forgotten native varieties such as Maturana Tinta and Graciano, producing wines of great personality and aromatic complexity. Their biodynamic practices and respect for the terroir have earned them international recognition.

tomasPostigo.story: Tomás Postigo produces author wines in Ribera del Duero with Tempranillo from old vines. Their limited production wines express the mineral and fruity character of one of Spain's finest terroirs, ageing in French and American oak barrels for the optimum time for each expression.

molinoRoca.story: Molino Roca is a family company producing first-quality extra virgin olive oils using olives from their own Catalan olive groves. Their Arbequina and Coupage EVOOs are characterised by their fruity freshness and elegant balance, ideal for fine cuisine and gourmet pastry.

treArchi.story: Tre Archi selects and distributes the finest Italian gastronomic products: from antipasti and artisan pasta to premium conserves. Each product is chosen with criteria of authenticity and maximum quality, allowing the Spanish hospitality sector to offer an authentic Italian gastronomic experience.

beautifood.story: Beautifood represents the vanguard of Spanish gastronomy, offering innovative and creative products for fine dining. Their constantly evolving catalogue allows the most creative chefs to explore new textures, flavours and presentations to elevate their culinary creations.
